text: A triangle has 3 sides. What do all the angles inside a triangle add up to?
generatorSolution: The angles inside any triangle always add up to 180°. You can also use the formula: subtract 2 from the number of sides, then multiply by 180. A triangle has 3 sides, so: (3 − 2) × 180 = 1 × 180 = 180°.
